content:
{
  "artifact_type": "visual_generation_prompt",
  "depth_tier": "D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE",
  "runtime_target": "Codex",
  "should_block": false,
  "blocked_reason": null,
  "compiled_intent": {
    "Objective": "Generate a visual compliance evidence artifact for a European Union law firm operator using the market_lens framework, suitable for regulatory audit and internal governance.",
    "Scope": "The prompt must produce a single visual (diagram, infographic, or dashboard mockup) that maps EU regulatory obligations (e.g., GDPR, AML directives) to operational controls, with explicit validation gates for completeness, accuracy, and traceability.",
    "Constraints": [
      "Must reference EU legal frameworks (GDPR, AML5/6, MiFID II) and include at least three compliance domains.",
      "Visual must be interpretable by non-technical stakeholders and auditors.",
      "No personally identifiable information (PII) or client-specific data in the output.",
      "Output must include a legend, source citations, and a version/date stamp.",
      "Must pass a validation gate checklist: (1) regulatory mapping complete, (2) control descriptions accurate, (3) evidence traceable to source documents."
    ],
    "Success Criteria": [
      "The generated visual contains at least three EU regulatory domains mapped to at least five operational controls.",
      "Each control has a corresponding evidence source (e.g., policy ID, audit log reference).",
      "Validation gates are explicitly listed and marked as passed/failed in the output metadata.",
      "The visual is self-contained and can be exported as a PNG or PDF for audit submission."
    ],
    "Output Contract": {
      "format": "JSON with fields: visual_type (string), regulatory_domains (array of strings), controls (array of objects with fields: control_id, description, evidence_source, validation_status), metadata (object with fields: version, date, author, validation_gates_passed), base64_encoded_image (string, optional placeholder).",
      "validation_gates": [
        "Gate 1: All regulatory domains are correctly cited with article numbers.",
        "Gate 2: Each control has a non-empty evidence_source field.",
        "Gate 3: Metadata includes version, date, and author.",
        "Gate 4: No PII or client data present in any field."
      ]
    }
  }
}
